title: Hedera - REKT
relevance_summary: Token service exploit leading to loss of liquidity and stablecoins on DEXs

prevention.rule: Block any tx that burns bridged/wrapped tokens or removes liquidity positions on DEXs using Uniswap v2-derived contract code.
prevention.trigger: BURN_TOKEN -> REMOVE_LIQUIDITY in Uniswap v2-derived contracts

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that burns bridged/wrapped tokens or removes liquidity positions on DEXs using Uniswap v2-derived contract code.
summary: The attack exploited vulnerabilities in the Hedera Token Service, allowing the attacker to burn bridged/wrapped tokens and remove liquidity positions from DEXs. A guard could have blocked such transactions to prevent losses.
